entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","097cc8ee-be3f-4a11-8a1d-f08cc5874d31","o|","auto","b|F","a|","9e830a8b-02a9-49be-bb75-1ee700eb75f5","02533b24-45cf-4a39-a6d7-79e2ad55db05","a|D|E|8","id","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S","2026-03-28T14:15:42.349Z","2026-03-28T14:36:24.408Z","claude-opus-4-6","isAgentConversation","a|X","b|T","o|Y|Z","66a7679a-bc8f-4941-9cdd-83bef8b87135","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","status","a|c|d|e","","type","content","a|h|i","doc","a|h","paragraph","o|l|m","a|n","o|j|k|o","draft","o|f|g|p|q","o|T|D|U|V|W|C|B|B|a|b|9|C|9|r","name","a|G|t|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|R|P|Q|S","Resolving Git merge idea conflicts\n","2026-03-28T14:34:04.348Z","2026-03-28T14:44:04.914Z","claude-sonnet-4-6","baselineTimestamp","a|X|z","n|0","o|10|Z|11","b7e46a2c-cf1e-4a96-aee2-d12ab9e37ab8","mentioned_items","a|c|d|e|14","o|15|g|p|q|C","o|u|E|v|w|x|y|C|B|B|12|13|9|9|C|16","Deep-RAG Project Analysis\n","2026-03-28T14:44:11.608Z","2026-03-29T14:35:30.055Z","59b36e71-f576-4285-acaf-575d962241ba","可以先用LLM 改成最有機會問的問題 ，再search ，因為玩家用廣東話問機會好高，面好難人手cover 曬 所有case ","text","a|h|1D","o|1E|1D|1C","a|1F","o|j|m|1G","a|1H","o|j|k|1I","o|f|1C|1J|q","o|u|8|18|19|1A|W|C|B|B|12|1B|9|9|C|1K","o|F|s|17|1L","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|1N|1O","o|1P|B|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|1M|1Q"],"1R"]
